skill.name: design-exploration
skill.description: 新功能设计探索流程。当用户有模糊想法要做新功能/新模块时使用。通过"需求收敛 → 技术调研 → ASCII 批量探索 → HTML 设计稿 → 全状态覆盖 → 需求总结"的结构化流程，从模糊想法产出可交付的设计参考文档，作为 PRD 阶段的输入。
skill.summary: 从模糊想法到可交付设计文档的结构化探索流程
skill.author: yunshu0909

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives. The backtick patterns are markdown syntax for inline code formatting (template variables like {模块名} and ASCII art boxes). No Ruby/shell command execution exists. The high-entropy flags are caused by Chinese UTF-8 characters in documentation. No cryptographic content or malicious patterns found.

medium_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backtick Syntax Misidentified
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' at 14 locations. These are markdown inline code syntax (backticks for formatting), NOT Ruby command execution. Examples include template variables {模块名}, {版本号}, and ASCII art boxes like ┌───┐.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed by reading SKILL.md - all backticks are markdown syntax for inline code, template variables, or ASCII art boxes, not executable shell commands.

low_findings.title: False Positive: High File Entropy Due to Chinese Characters
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged high entropy (7.26 and 6.33 bits) as possible encrypted content. This is caused by UTF-8 Chinese characters which naturally have higher byte entropy than ASCII. No binary or encrypted content exists.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Chinese UTF-8 characters contain multi-byte sequences with higher entropy readings. Verified by reading file content - only markdown text and template variables present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Detection
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' at 6 locations. No cryptographic code exists. Scanner likely misidentified template variable syntax or markdown header patterns.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Verified by reading files - no cryptographic algorithms present. Scanner pattern matching triggered on unrelated content.

content.value_statement: Transform vague feature ideas into deliverable design documents through structured exploration. This skill guides users from fuzzy concepts to concrete design specifications using proven workflows for requirements convergence, technical research, and comprehensive UI documentation.
actual_capabilities: Guides users through structured design exploration from vague ideas to concrete specifications
Produces 3 deliverables: requirements summary, HTML mockups, and complete state coverage documents
Enforces comprehensive edge case and error state coverage beyond normal flows
Conducts technical feasibility research before visual design begins
Generates interactive HTML prototypes for browser preview and feedback
Documents all confirmed decisions for PRD and development handoff
limitations: Does not execute code or integrate with design tools directly
Cannot replace professional UI/UX designers for complex design systems
Requires user participation for requirement clarification and design decisions
Output quality depends on user-provided context and requirements

use_cases.title: New Feature Ideation
use_cases.description: When product managers have a fuzzy idea for a new feature but need to explore different approaches before committing to a specific design direction.

use_cases.title: Design Documentation Handoff
use_cases.description: When development teams need comprehensive design references including all UI states, error handling, and interaction rules for implementation.

use_cases.title: Stakeholder Alignment
use_cases.description: When teams need to visualize and validate feature concepts with stakeholders before allocating development resources.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Feature Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to add a feature to [describe context]. The main pain point is [describe problem]. Help me explore the design.
prompt_templates.scenario: Users with a clear pain point but no concrete requirements

prompt_templates.title: Reference Existing Design
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to design [feature name]. We have an existing design system at [path]. The reference page is [URL or path]. Please follow our design tokens.
prompt_templates.scenario: Users with existing design constraints and references

prompt_templates.title: Technical Constraints Included
prompt_templates.prompt: We are building [feature]. The data comes from [data source]. I have already researched and confirmed [technical constraints]. Start with requirement alignment.

prompt_templates.title: Full Exploration Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Complete design exploration for [feature]. Include requirement convergence, technical research, ASCII exploration, HTML mockup, and complete state coverage. This is for [carrier type].
prompt_templates.scenario: Users requesting complete end-to-end design exploration

output_examples.input: 用户说：我想做一个 MCP 服务管理工具
output_examples.output: 产出设计目录: 设计/v0.11-MCP管理/ 包含 需求总结.md（背景、目标、功能范围、关键决策）、mcp-manager-设计稿.html（主界面 mockup）、mcp-manager-全状态设计参考.html（所有状态、Toast、交互规则表）

output_examples.input: 用户说：我想做一个文件上传功能
output_examples.output: 完整状态覆盖：正常态（拖拽上传区）、上传中态（进度条）、成功态（文件卡片）、失败态（错误提示）、空态（引导文案）、大文件边界情况、长文件名截断规则

output_examples.input: 用户说：设计一个设置页面
output_examples.output: ASCII 批量探索：5-8 个不同布局方案（卡片列表、表格视图、分组开关等），用户选择方向后产出 HTML mockup，包含所有设置项状态和保存反馈

best_practices: Always clarify requirements scope before generating any designs - ask what the feature should and should not do
Generate multiple ASCII layout options (5-8) to give users meaningful choices before investing in HTML mockups
Document every confirmed decision in the requirements summary - do not leave decisions only in conversation context
anti_patterns: Do not start generating HTML mockups immediately after the user describes their idea in one sentence
Do not produce only the happy path - always cover loading states, error states, empty states, and edge cases
Do not skip technical research when the feature involves external data sources or APIs

faq.question: What does this skill actually output?
faq.answer: Three files: a requirements summary document (Markdown), a main HTML mockup for visual reference, and a comprehensive state coverage document with all UI states and interaction rules.

faq.question: How is this different from a simple design tool?
faq.answer: This skill enforces a structured workflow that ensures requirement alignment before design, covers all edge cases and error states, and produces documentation ready for PRD and development handoff.

faq.question: Do I need to provide design specifications?
faq.answer: Not required but recommended. If you have existing design tokens or reference pages, the skill will use them. If not, the skill will ask about style preferences.

faq.question: Can this replace a UI designer?
faq.answer: No. This skill helps explore and document design concepts but does not replace professional design judgment for complex design systems or creative direction.

faq.question: What if I only have a vague idea?
faq.answer: That is exactly when to use this skill. The workflow starts with requirement clarification to help you refine your ideas into actionable specifications.

faq.question: Does this integrate with code repositories?
faq.answer: No direct integration. The skill outputs design documents that can be manually added to your repository or documentation system.
